recentTweets.text: Honored to join leaders from across the nuclear industry to discuss the important work being done to clean up our nation’s legacy sites at the Nuclear Cleanup Caucus. Oak Ridge is leading the way in addressing the environmental and safety challenges at legacy nuclear sites while https://t.co/LByAQdOH9u

It was great meeting young leaders from the Boys and Girls Club. We discussed how these programs empower youth, build leadership, and help prepare the next generation for success. Seeing their motivation to improve their communities is truly inspiring. https://t.co/Z16QInnKIa
Had a great conversation with @VP about the future of American energy! https://t.co/T14Mt78j8m

Today, I spoke at the American Energy Dominance Caucus about the vital connection between energy and artificial intelligence. As Co-Chair, I’m dedicated to preparing America’s grid for the future and ensuring we have the reliable, abundant energy needed to lead in AI. https://t.co/9B8rc4xgjy

It was a pleasure to meet with Kevin Freudenberg, interim director of the ITER Project Office at @ORNL, to discuss ITER, the world’s largest international fusion-energy project. Their work plays a crucial role in keeping America at the forefront of global energy innovation. https://t.co/maEKvxnNcN

Enjoyed meeting with @TerraPower for an update on the Natrium demonstration reactor and the company’s broader work to advance nuclear technology. Projects like these advance America’s goal of energy leadership and security. https://t.co/qccCT4cSkn

Honored to be recognized by @NRFnews for supporting the retail industry in Congress. With millions of TN retail jobs, I’m committed to policies that help this vital sector and our local businesses grow and thrive for families across our state. https://t.co/9FZ9ZIRGC6

Appreciated meeting the Kairos Power team to discuss progress on Hermes 1 & 2 in Oak Ridge and their work with @ENERGY. Tennessee leads in nuclear innovation, and I’m proud of our state’s role in securing America’s clean, reliable energy future. https://t.co/PzhsDeAj6g

It was great to meet with the Eastern Band of the Cherokee tribe regarding the Eastern Band of Cherokee Historic Lands Reacquisition Act. I have introduced this important legislation for six straight Congresses, and I remain committed to seeing it through. Working with tribal https://t.co/r6CCFNxLsf
